reason: An opt-in 'copy the destination path to the clipboard after a drop' setting is a functional addition, not a redesign. The UI diff only adds one checkbox to the existing System section of the settings window and a Clipboard.SetText call in the shared RememberDropHistory path (guarded by the setting and a Succeeded status), reusing the destination the drop already records. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the settings layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is the AppConfig flag. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
